content.query:
drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_rxclaim_price_t;

CREATE TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_rxclaim_price_t
	(
	 [rxclaimfilluid] nvarchar(50),
	 [claimstatuscode] nvarchar(50),
	 [memberuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [provideruid] nvarchar(50),
	 [providernpi] nvarchar(50),
	 [prescribingnpi] nvarchar(50),
	 [dispensingnpi] nvarchar(50),
	 [filldate] nvarchar(50),
	 [ndc11code] nvarchar(50),
	 [supplydayscount] nvarchar(50),
	 [dispensedquantity] nvarchar(50),
	 [allowedamount] nvarchar(50),
	 [copayamount] nvarchar(50),
	 [paidamount] nvarchar(50),
	 [pricingallowedamount] nvarchar(50),
	 [createddate] nvarchar(50)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_treatment_rxclaim_price_t;

CREATE TABLE customer.stg_ino_treatment_rxclaim_price_t
	(
	 [rxclaimfilluid] nvarchar(50),
	 [claimstatuscode] nvarchar(50),
	 [memberuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [provideruid] nvarchar(50),
	 [providernpi] nvarchar(50),
	 [prescribingnpi] nvarchar(50),
	 [dispensingnpi] nvarchar(50),
	 [filldate] nvarchar(50),
	 [ndc11code] nvarchar(50),
	 [supplydayscount] nvarchar(50),
	 [dispensedquantity] nvarchar(50),
	 [allowedamount] nvarchar(50),
	 [copayamount] nvarchar(50),
	 [paidamount] nvarchar(50),
	 [pricingallowedamount] nvarchar(50),
	 [createddate] nvarchar(50)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

--Uncomment the 4 lines below to create a stored procedure for data pipeline orchestration​
--CREATE PROC bulk_load_stg_ino_control_rxclaim_price_t
--AS
--BEGIN
COPY INTO customer.stg_ino_control_rxclaim_price_t
(rxclaimfilluid 1, claimstatuscode 2, memberuid 3, provideruid 4, providernpi 5, prescribingnpi 6, dispensingnpi 7, filldate 8, ndc11code 9, supplydayscount 10, dispensedquantity 11, allowedamount 12, copayamount 13, paidamount 14, pricingallowedamount 15, createddate 16)
FROM 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/21537399/Inovalon/Inbound/control_consolidated_rxclaim_price_combined.txt'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE = 'CSV'
	,MAXERRORS = 0
	,FIELDTERMINATOR = '|'
	,FIRSTROW = 11
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'
)
--END
GO

SELECT TOP 100 * FROM customer.stg_ino_control_rxclaim_price_t
GO
